title: Run Qdrant in Docker
text: Qdrant can run as a local Docker container. Expose port 6333 to query the REST API from your application.

title: Ollama embedding model
text: Use ollama pull nomic-embed-text to install an embedding model. Then call /api/embed or /api/embeddings to generate vectors.

title: Vector search workflow
text: A common workflow is: embed text chunks, store vectors in Qdrant, then embed user queries and retrieve nearest neighbors.

title: Collection design
text: In Qdrant each collection has a fixed vector size and distance metric. Cosine distance is a frequent default for text embeddings.

title: Metadata payloads
text: Attach metadata payloads like title and category to every point so traversal and filtering are easier.

title: Local RAG prototype
text: For a local RAG prototype, Ollama handles embeddings while Qdrant stores and retrieves similar chunks for grounding.

title: Traversing points
text: Use Qdrant scroll pagination to traverse every point in a collection without running a semantic search query.

title: Search quality
text: Retrieval quality improves when chunks are concise, domain specific, and embedded with a model that matches your query style.
